title: Marmaroxylon dinizii
taxonomy: Marmaroxylon dinizii is a species of tree in the family Lauraceae. It is native to South America. This plant is classified as part of the genus Marmaroxylon, which belongs to the Lauraceae family, an order of flowering plants known as the laurales. The Laurales order is part of the magnoliids clade, which is a distinct group within the flowering plant division angiosperms. The exact classification of Marmaroxylon dinizii can be broken down into kingdom Plantae, clade angiosperms, clade magnoliids, order laurales, family Lauraceae, genus Marmaroxylon, and species M. dinizii.
